rows.label: qev085505_MSG0001
rows.name: How did it feel, Gwin?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085505_MSG0002
rows.name:
You have a really good look
on your face somehow![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085505_MSG0003
rows.name: Yeah![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085505_MSG0004
rows.name:
Colonel Elma, thank you very much. I will return
to the beginning and start over from the basics.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085505_MSG0005
rows.name: I remembered.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085505_MSG0005_2
rows.name:
He was always doing basic training late into
the night without ever getting tired of it.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085505_MSG0006
rows.name: I was curious, but who is this "he"?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085505_MSG0007
rows.name: Leon. He was my best friend. And—[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085505_MSG0008
rows.name:
He was Irina's younger brother. He
couldn't board the White Whale.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085505_MSG0009
rows.name: Gwin-san, I'm sorry.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085505_MSG0010
rows.name: No, it's fine.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085505_MSG0010_2
rows.name:
He was incredibly strong, and I was
always being protected by him.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085505_MSG0011
rows.name:
Lieutenant Irina always had a look of
relief whenever she was with him, too—[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085505_MSG0012
rows.name:
I was envious of him. That's
why I wanted to be like Leon—[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085505_JNK0010
rows.name: Demon Instructor

rows.label: qev085505_SEL0011
rows.name: Cross your arms and tell him, "Surpass Leon!"

rows.label: qev085505_JNK0020
rows.name: Tough Love

rows.label: qev085505_SEL0021
rows.name: Push him away by saying it's impossible for Gwin.

rows.label: qev085505_MSG0013
rows.name:
Indeed. We'd be troubled if you were
satisfied with just being the same.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085505_MSG0013_m
rows.name:
He's right. We can't have you
settling for "good enough."[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085505_MSG0013_f
rows.name:
She's right. We can't have you
settling for "good enough."[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085505_MSG0014
rows.name: Two demon instructors![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085505_MSG0015
rows.name:
That's right. Instead of aiming to be like him,
I will do my best so that I can surpass him![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085505_MSG0016
rows.name: Fufu. How strict.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085505_MSG0017
rows.name: You're more of a demon than Elma-san mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085505_MSG0017_m
rows.name: You're more of a demon than Elma-san mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085505_MSG0017_f
rows.name: You're more of a demon than Elma-san mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085505_MSG0018
rows.name:
It's impossible for the current
me, but I realized something.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085505_MSG0019
rows.name:
His time has stopped, but— my
time is still moving forward.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085505_MSG0020
rows.name:
Therefore, if I put in the proper effort from now
on, I believe I will surely surpass him someday.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085505_MSG0021
rows.name:
When that time comes, will
you spar with me again?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085505_MSG0022
rows.name: Yes, of course.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085505_MSG0023
rows.name: But, the path is long, isn't it.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085505_MSG0024
rows.name:
It's not just about becoming strong, but
strong enough to protect Irina-san, right?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085505_MSG0025
rows.name: Wh-why would you say that?![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085505_MSG0026
rows.name: I can see right through it all~~[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085505_MSG0027
rows.name:
Because when you talk about Irina-san,
Gwin-san, you're incredibly serious.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085505_MSG0029
rows.name:
If even Lin can see through you,
you still have a long way to go.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085505_MSG0030
rows.name:
So I still need training in this area
as well, huh— The path really is long.[ST:wait ]
